admin_account_setup_description: Configure administrator credentials here. Login protection is enabled automatically once both username and password are set. Changes affecting authentication will require re-login.
auto_https_cert: Automatically Request and Issue HTTPS Certificates (Let's Encrypt)
auto_rescan_enabled_hint: Automatic rescan has been enabled. The system will periodically scan the library
auto_rescan_interval_minutes_desc: In minutes. Set to 0 to disable automatic scanning
auto_tls_disabled_custom_cert_set: A custom certificate is configured. Auto TLS has been disabled.
auto_tls_disabled_invalid_domain: Auto TLS requires a valid domain to function. Auto TLS has been disabled.
auto_tls_disabled_lan_access_off: Auto TLS has been disabled because LAN access is turned off.
browser_not_support_audio: Your browser does not support audio playback
browser_not_support_video: Your browser does not support video playback
cache_dir_description: Local image cache location, default system temporary folder.
cache_file_clean: Clear all cache files on exit
cache_file_dir: Cache folder, defaults to the system temp directory and is cleared when the program exits
cache_file_enable: Save web image cache files to speed up subsequent reading (consumes disk space)
cannot_listen: Cannot start listening on the server
clear_cache_exit_description: When exiting the program, clear the web image cache.
comigo_example:
comi book.zip

Set the web service port (default is 1234):
  comi -p 2345 book.zip

Without opening a browser (Windows):
  comi -o=false book.zip

Multiple parameters:
  comi -p 2345 --host example.com test.zip
comigo_xyz_description: Help you read manga on all devices - Whether computer or phone, Windows, Linux,　MacOS
comigo_xyz_feature_cross_platform_desc: Supports Linux, Windows, Mac OS operating systems
comigo_xyz_feature_download_desc: Batch download image folders, convert to EPUB format
comigo_xyz_feature_format_desc: Supports ZIP, RAR, CBZ, EPUB, PDF and other comic formats
comigo_xyz_feature_history_desc: Automatic reading history tracking for easy continuation
comigo_xyz_feature_plugin_desc: Auto page-turn, clock and more plugins, with custom plugin support
comigo_xyz_feature_reading_modes_desc: Supports flip mode and scroll mode to meet different reading habits
comigo_xyz_feature_responsive_desc: Adapts to desktop and mobile devices
comigo_xyz_feature_security_desc: Supports HTTPS and user authentication, built-in Tailscale remote access
comigo_xyz_no_install_title: You do not even have to install it:
comigo_xyz_quick_start_step2: Configure your library path in settings
comigo_xyz_subtitle: Comigo - Simple and EasyUse Manga Reader
comigo_xyz_try_offline_or_add_pwa: 📴 Try Pure Offline Mode or Add as PWA App
completed_and_load_full: You have reached the last page. Click the button below to load the full content.
config_manager_description: Clicking Save will upload the current configuration to the server and overwrite the existing configuration file.
config_storage_location_prompt: Select the location to store the config file:
confirm_clear_cache: Are you sure you want to clear this book's cache files? (metadata and cover cache)
confirm_delete_store: Confirm to delete the store? This will also delete all book data in this store
confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to log out?
confirm_reset_settings: Are you sure you want to reset local settings?
content_empty_please_enter_before_submit: Content is empty. Please enter content before submitting.
current_dir_scope: When run in the current directory (local scope)
debug_description: Enable Debug to print more debugging information and check some settings related to unfinished hidden features.
disable_lan_description: Reading services are only provided on this machine and are not shared externally.
drag_or_click_to_upload: Drag and drop files here or click to select files
enable_database: Enable a local database to store scanned book data
enable_database_description: Enable local database to save scanned book data.
enable_plugin_description: Enable the plugin system to allow inserting custom HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code into pages.
enable_single_instance: Enable single instance mode to ensure only one program instance runs at a time
enable_tailscale_description: Enable the Tailscale intranet penetration feature. The first time you enable it, verification is required in the Tailscale admin console.
epub_cannot_resort: Cannot rearrange pages in EPUB files:

funnel_login_check_description: When enabling the Funnel tunnel, require Comigo login protection to be available first.

funnel_require_password_1: When enabling Funnel Login Check, you must set an Comigo account and password to use the Funnel tunnel.
funnel_tunnel_description: Funnel Tunnel (public access) . If you don’t want to publish publicly, it is recommended to set password protection. Funnel Tunnel can only use ports 443, 8443, and 10000.
generate_meta_data_description:

Not currently in effect.

lang: Interface language setting (auto, zh, en, ja), default is auto (auto-detect)

log_to_file_description:
Whether to save the program log to a local file. 
Not saved by default.
log_username_or_password_empty: Username or password is empty. Using default Jwt Signing key.
log_warning_failed_to_get_executable_pat: Warning: failed to get Executable path: %v
log_warning_failed_to_set_socket_permiss: Warning: failed to set socket permissions: %v
login_error_teapot: The server does not require authentication; please access the homepage directly.
login_failed: Login failed, please check your username and password
login_forgot_password_hint: Forgot your password? Please contact the system administrator
login_subtitle: Please enter your username and password
long_description: comigo, a simple comic book reader.
max_scan_depth_description:
Maximum scan depth. 
Files exceeding the depth will not be scanned. 
The current execution directory is the base.
min_image_num_description: A compressed package or folder must contain at least a few pictures to be considered a book.
min_media_num: Minimum number of media files required before the ZIP is considered a comic archive
no_available_stores: No available stores, please add store paths in settings first
no_books_library_path_notice: No readable books were found. Please configure a library path. When scanning finishes, you will be prompted to refresh the page.
no_config_file_to_delete_in_path: There is no configuration file to delete in the selected path.
not_support_fullscreen: This browser does not support fullscreen mode.
open_browser_description:
After the scan is completed, whether to open the browser at the same time. 
The default is true for windows and false for other platforms.
password_login_always_enabled_descriptio: Page and API login protection is enabled automatically once both username and password are set.
passwords_not_match: The two passwords entered do not match.
player_autoplay_help: Auto play next and loop require media playback permission in your browser. On mobile devices, it may also fail due to battery saver/background restrictions.
please_delete_other_config_first: Please delete configuration files from other locations first.
port_busy: %v port is occupied, trying a random port
port_change_hint: Port has been changed. Redirecting to the new port shortly.
port443_busy_disable_auto_tls: Port 443 is busy, disabling Auto TLS.
portable_binary_scope: Effective for this binary only (portable mode)
print_all_ip: Print all available network interface IP addresses
program_directory: The directory where the program is located
read_only_mode_description: You are currently in read-only mode.You cannot change settings or upload files via the web interface.
reader_no_images_found: No readable images found in this archive
reader_pwa_already_installed: This page is already running as a PWA app
reader_pwa_install_ready: Ready to add as a PWA app
reader_pwa_install_unavailable: The browser has not provided the add prompt yet. Use the browser menu to add this app or add it to the home screen, or refresh and try again.
reader_select_archive_hint: ZIP/CBZ/RAR/CBR are decompressed in your browser and never uploaded
register_context_menu: Register context menu: Open with Comigo
register_file_association: Register archive file association (as a candidate)
register_folder_context_menu: Register folder context menu: Open with Comigo
rescan_store_success: Store scan completed, {0} new books added
select_store_to_operate: Please select a store to operate
self_upgrade_flag: Check for updates and upgrade via comigo.xyz (GitHub releases)
settings_custom_theme_desc: Theme color settings are stored only in this browser. You can choose a built-in theme or a custom theme.
settings_custom_theme_not_active: Current theme is not custom, using built-in color settings.
shutdown_hint: Shutting down. Press Ctrl+C again to force.
skip_and_load_full: Read pages not loaded (first %d pages), click the button below to load all
sort_by_modify_time: Sort by Modify Time (Newest to Oldest)
sort_by_modify_time_reverse: Sort by Modify Time (Oldest to Newest)
start_clear_file: - Interrupted operation, cleaning the temporary folder -
store_urls_description:
Library folder; supports absolute and relative paths.Relative paths are based on the current working directory.
Experimental support for SFTP and SMB remote paths. Format examples:
sftp://user:pass@192.168.1.1:22/some/path
smb://guest@192.168.1.1:445/some/path
support_file_type_description: When scanning a file, it is used to decide whether to skip or count it as a file suffix for book processing.
support_media_type_description: Image file suffix used to count the number of images when scanning compressed packages
systray_check_upgrade_tooltip: Check comigo.xyz for updates; download and restart if a newer version is available
tailscale_auth_key_description: Tailscale automatic authentication key (TS_AUTHKEY), used for authentication in environments without a browser.
tailscale_auth_url_is: To start Tailscale service, restart with TS_AUTHKEY set, or go to:
tailscale_hostname_description: Tailscale hostname part. The full domain looks like {hostname}.example.ts.net
tailscale_port_description: Tailscale listening port. Default is 443, TLS is enabled automatically.
tailscale_settings_submitted_check_statu: Tailscale settings submitted. Please check Tailscale status.
timeout_description:
Cookie expiration time after enabling login. 
The unit is minutes.
tui_backend_failed: Backend start failed, check log panel.
tui_controls_hint: Enter: open local, Backspace: back, Tab: switch focus
tui_service_started: ComiGo service started. Shelf and logs will update continuously.
tui_shelf_empty_hint: Wait for scan to complete, or check store path settings.
tui_shelf_waiting_hint: Top shelf will appear after scanning.
tui_terminal_too_small: Terminal too small, resize to at least %dx%d.
ui_suggest_reload_default: Server data has changed. Reload the page to see the latest UI?
ui_suggest_reload_reason_auto_library_re: Scheduled library scan finished. Reload the page to refresh the shelf and related views?
ui_suggest_reload_reason_debug_toggle: Debug mode changed. Reload the page to show the related settings?
ui_suggest_reload_reason_library_rescan_: Library scan finished. Reload the page to refresh the shelf and related views?
ui_suggest_reload_reason_login_settings_: Login settings updated. Reload the page?
ui_suggest_reload_reason_plugins_changed: Plugins changed. Reload the page to apply?
ui_suggest_reload_reason_server_config_c: Network or server settings changed. Reload the page?
ui_suggest_reload_reason_single_store_re: This library has been rescanned. Reload the page?
unable_to_extract_images_from_pdf: Unable to extract images from PDF.
unregister_context_menu: Unregister context menu: Open with Comigo
unregister_folder_context_menu: Unregister folder context menu: Open with Comigo
upgrade_binary_not_found: Could not find comi or comi.exe in the archive.
upgrade_invalid_version_compare: Cannot compare versions (local %q, remote %q); skipping upgrade.
upgrade_no_matching_asset: No matching package for this system in release (%s).
upgrade_success: Upgrade complete. Please restart to run the new version.
upgrade_tray_dmg_failed: Failed to process macOS disk image: %v
upgrade_tray_no_asset: No tray installer found for this platform.
upgrade_unsupported_arch: Self-upgrade is not supported on this OS/arch: %s/%s
upload_disable_hint: File upload feature has been disabled
use_cache_description: Enable local image extraction cache, disabled by default.
value_already_exists_do_not_add_again: The value already exists. Please do not add it again.
zip_encode: Manually specify ZIP file encoding (e.g., gbk, shiftjis)
zip_file_text_encoding_description:
Non-utf-8 encoded ZIP file, what encoding should be used to parse it. 
Default GBK.
